data.title: Voltalia SA reports total number of shares and voting rights in share capital as of January 31, 2026 according to French regulations.
data.description: As of January 31, 2026, the total number of shares and voting rights in the company's share capital is reported in accordance with Articles L. 233-8 (II) of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulations of the French Financial Markets Authority.

data.title: AI spending surge causes tech selloff, small-cap rise in 2026. SP 500 breaks even; Magnificent 7 stocks down 7.3%. Meta's $27B data center project hidden, raising concerns on tech giants' AI investment. Ernst & Young calls out accounting complexity. Tech firms investing heavily in AI, chips, and data centers spark investor anxiety on margin compression.
data.description: The market has shifted from a tech-dominated to a less stable ground in 2026, with the S&P 500 breaking even and Magnificent 7 stocks recording a 7.3% negative return. Surging AI capital expenditures have raised investor concerns on future margins, despite companies like Amazon emphasizing operational efficiencies. A recent audit reveals Meta's $27 billion data center project kept off the balance sheet through a joint venture, leading to questions about leverage and infrastructure risks not reflected in reported numbers. Tech giants investing billions in AI, chips, and data centers are now facing potential margin compression and disruptions.

data.title: EHang showcased 16 EH216-S eVTOL aircraft and 22,580 GD4.0 drones at China's Spring Festival with advanced flight safety.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on February 17, 2026, EHang Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: EH) showcased a dual-feature aerial performance at the 2026 China Media Group (CMG) Spring Festival Gala in Hefei. The event featured 16 EH216-S pilotless eVTOL aircraft and a drone light show with 22,580 GHOSTDRONE 4.0 unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). This performance set a record and offered futuristic visuals for Lunar New Year greetings to a global audience. EHang, a key player in Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) technology, demonstrated industry-leading flight safety and fleet orchestration during the spectacle.

data.title: VeChain introduces StarGate staking platform: 10K VET required for NFT positions. March 15 migration deadline for legacy node holders.
data.description: The new StarGate staking platform by VeChain is currently active, offering NFT-based positions that commence at 10,000 VET. Node holders with legacy status must complete the migration process before the deadline on March 15.

data.title: Epiphany Dermatology expands presence in Missouri through partnership with Regional Dermatology in Austin, Texas.
data.description: Epiphany Dermatology, a prominent dermatology company, has increased its footprint in Missouri by teaming up with Regional Dermatology, LLC based in Austin, Texas.

data.title: Trafficmind expands Anycast network to Osaka, Japan, adding 100 Gbps capacity for latency-sensitive workloads in APAC.
data.description: Today, Trafficmind.com revealed the enhancement of its worldwide Anycast network by incorporating new edge capacity in Osaka, Japan. This development aims to bolster assistance for latency-sensitive and compliance-directed operations within the Asia-Pacific area. The recent addition in Osaka contributes 100 Gbps of edge capacity and is situated in Equinix-operated carrier-neutral sites. This advancement elevates regional closeness, durability, and data transfer capacity for customers catering to this region.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund's NAV for January 2026 is EUR 0.5450 per unit with total value at EUR 78.2 million.
data.description: At the end of January 2026, the Baltic Horizon Fund reported a net asset value (NAV) per unit of EUR 0.5450, slightly down from EUR 0.5451 at the end of December 2025. The total net asset value of the Fund also remained constant, standing at EUR 78.2 million at year-end 2026, the same as it was at the end of December 2025.
